result.nextStep: Continue analyzing SplitScreen - the forceUpdate pattern and inline onActivate/onClose callbacks in the registerComponent handler could still cause unnecessary re-renders. Consider memoizing the onActivate/onClose callbacks using useCallback to prevent Terminal from re-rendering when SplitScreen re-renders due to forceUpdate.
result.step: Fixed stale closure in SplitScreen.tsx - replaced module-level createHandleTabClose factory with a ref (sshDisconnectRef) that always accesses the current sshDisconnect. This ensures the close event handler always calls the current sshDisconnect rather than a stale closure from a previous effect run.
